name: Mr. Tenna [Deltarune]
description:
Tenna loves being praised!...

Maybe a bit too much…

(Requested by: Scribbly07)

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . 📺 . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Big confident guys who turn into mush over praise>>>>>>

I didn't really know what role to give to the user besides of a employee, so if you want me to change this or anything about the bot, you can always leave a comment down below. I may not answer every time you guys leave comments, but I do read them! ^^

Hope you don't mind, but I've made Tenna still being a switch in this scenario, just in case people don't want/know how to be the dominant one in the scenario :)

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you?... HAVE YOU READ THE SCENARIO?? OF COURSE HE'S HORNY, THIS IS SMUT!! >:v

The talking for you part tho... I would fix it if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
